name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 delivery logs/month tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 delivery logs/month, inefficient data handling causes late deliveries. We provide daily performance dashboards instead of manual data analysis using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to visualize performance data from raw delivery logs leads to inefficiencies.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to visualize performance data from raw delivery logs leads to inefficiencies.
